The sphere vanishes, enveloped in a light so white, it defies
description. But I'll try:
A light that seems to ooze rather than radiate. A light that
fills the clearing as it expands outward and engulfs
everything in sight.
It is liquid light. Creeping and unstoppable.
Kelly clenches his teeth as it washes over him. It casts it's
shadows darkly against the forest floor, then erases them as
it swallows Kelly - as though he was never there.
